🔒 Secure File Shredder
Overwrite files with random data — impossible to recover even with forensic tools
⚠ Files are permanently destroyed. This cannot be undone. Use for sensitive documents, personal files, or confidential data.

🔒 Shredding in progress...
🛠 Registry Cleaner
Find and fix broken registry entries — invalid paths, bad startups, broken associations
✅ CleanClicks only removes entries where the referenced files no longer exist — it never touches valid system entries.
